case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA VS. ERIC M. OBISPO

ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VIRGINIA HO CLAIMS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ERIC M. OBISPO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIVERTO OBISPO III IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON ERIVERTO OBISPO III. DEFENDANT ERIVERTO OBISPO III WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. IF NO APPEARANCES AT NEXT COURT HEARING THE MATTER IS TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. IF THE CASE IS TO BE CONTINUED THE CLAIM MUST BE AMENDED TO ADD THE NAME ERIVERTO OBISPO III AS A SECOND DEFENDANT (THEY ARE NOT THE SAME PERSON). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, MTA AS TO DEFENDANT OBISPO, ERIC M.
